meta.name: description
meta.content: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

meta.name: keywords
meta.content: sattiyan selvarajah, software developer, full-stack developer, laravel developer, next.js developer, saas development, web applications, automation, dotkod solutions
The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

meta.name: theme-color
meta.script: {"@context":"https://schema.org","@graph":[{"@type":"Person","@id":"https://sattiyans.com/#person","name":"Sattiyan Selvarajah","jobTitle":"Senior Software Developer & Founder","description":"Senior Software Developer and founder of Dotkod Solutions, building scalable web platforms, SaaS products, and automation solutions.","url":"https://sattiyans.com","image":"https://sattiyans.com/og-image.png","sameAs":["https://github.com/sattiyans","https://www.linkedin.com/in/sattiyans","https://x.com/sattiyans","https://letterboxd.com/sattiyans","https://serializd.com/user/sattiyans","https://instagram.com/sattiyanss","https://www.facebook.com/people/Sattiyan-Selvarajah/100090108949254/","https://threads.com/sattiyanss"],"worksFor":{"@id":"https://sattiyans.com/#organization"},"knowsAbout":["PHP","Laravel","SaaS Development","E-commerce","AI Integration","Web Development"]},{"@type":"Organization","@id":"https://sattiyans.com/#organization","name":"Dotkod Solutions","url":"https://dotkod.com","founder":{"@id":"https://sattiyans.com/#person"}},{"@type":"WebSite","@id":"https://sattiyans.com/#website","url":"https://sattiyans.com","name":"Sattiyan Selvarajah Portfolio","description":"The page you're looking for doesn't exist."}]}

meta.name: astro-view-transitions-fallback

button.class: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-gray-100 dark:bg-black border border-black/15 dark:border-white/20 shadow-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-white hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-black/80 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black/20 dark:focus:ring-white/20

div.class: absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mt-2 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-black border border-black/15 dark:border-white/20 rounded-full shadow-2xl py-3 px-4 opacity-0 invisible pointer-events-none transition-all duration-300 ease-out transform translate-y-2 flex flex-row items-center gap-2 overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hide z-[10000]

div.class: mt-8 pt-6 border-t border-black/5 dark:border-white/5 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4

button.class: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 p-3 bg-black dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-black rounded-full shadow-lg hover:bg-gray-800 dark:hover:bg-gray-200 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out transform hover:scale-110 hidden sm:block
button.title: Back to top

div.class: fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 z-50 chatbot-wrapper w-full px-4 pointer-events-none

chatbot-mobile-collapsed sm:hidden bg-gray-100 dark:bg-black rounded-full shadow-2xl border border-black/15 dark:border-white/20 w-12 h-12 mx-auto backdrop-blur-sm hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-black/80 transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer pointer-events-auto
chatbot-container hidden sm:block max-w-lg w-full mx-auto pointer-events-auto

chatbot-response mb-3 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-black rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-black/15 dark:border-white/20 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm overflow-y-auto transition-all duration-300 opacity-0 transform translate-y-4 pointer-events-none

button.class: chatbot-close-btn flex-shrink-0 ml-2 mt-0.5 text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-600 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors opacity-0 pointer-events-none

div.class: bg-gray-100 dark:bg-black rounded-full shadow-2xl border border-black/15 dark:border-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-black/80 transition-all duration-300

input.placeholder: Hi, I'm Luna. Ask me anything about Sattiyan.
input.class: chatbot-input chatbot-element w-full bg-transparent text-gray-900 dark:text-white placeholder-gray-700 dark:placeholder-gray-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none text-sm transition-all duration-300 focus:scale-105

div.class: chatbot-suggestions hidden absolute bottom-full left-0 right-0 mb-2 bg-black dark:bg-black border border-white/20 dark:border-white/20 rounded-lg shadow-lg max-h-48 overflow-y-auto z-50
send-icon flex-shrink-0 opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 chatbot-element hover:text-blue-500 dark:hover:text-blue-400
chatbot-mobile-expanded hidden sm:hidden max-w-xs w-full mx-auto pointer-events-auto

chatbot-response mb-2 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-black rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-black/15 dark:border-white/20 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm overflow-y-auto transition-all duration-300 opacity-0 transform translate-y-4 pointer-events-none

button.class: chatbot-close-btn flex-shrink-0 ml-1 mt-0.5 text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-600 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors opacity-0 pointer-events-none

div.class: bg-gray-100 dark:bg-black rounded-full shadow-2xl border border-black/15 dark:border-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-black/80 transition-all duration-500

input.placeholder: Hi, I'm Luna. Ask me anything about Sattiyan.
input.class: chatbot-mobile-input w-full bg-transparent text-gray-900 dark:text-white placeholder-gray-700 dark:placeholder-gray-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none text-sm transition-all duration-300

div.class: chatbot-suggestions hidden absolute bottom-full left-0 right-0 mb-2 bg-black dark:bg-black border border-white/20 dark:border-white/20 rounded-lg shadow-lg max-h-48 overflow-y-auto z-50
send-icon-mobile flex-shrink-0 opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 hover:text-blue-500 dark:hover:text-blue-400
